name: Mache & Beet Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 White or golden beets (cooked, peeled and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl combine the chopped lovage or parsley, balsamic vinegar, and olive oil.
2. Add the cooked, peeled, and chopped beets to the dressing. Toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
3. Let the mixture marinate for 1 hour at room temperature.
4. After marinating, add the chopped mache to the bowl. Toss gently to combine.
5. Garnish with sliced hard-boiled eggs and croutons before serving.
